adminOnly: Admin access required to modify AI provider settings
description: Configure AI providers for content generation and analytics insights

dialog.apiKeyDescription: Your key is stored securely. Leave blank to keep existing key.
dialog.priorityDescription: Lower number = higher priority in fallback chain

help.apiProviders: Anthropic and OpenAI are cloud-based AI services that require API keys and incur usage costs.
help.explanation: AI providers power the intelligent features in CastorWorks, including analytics insights, daily briefings, and content generation. You can configure multiple providers and set up automatic fallbacks.
help.fallbackChain: The fallback chain determines which provider to try if the primary provider fails or is unavailable.
help.ollama: OLLAMA allows you to run open-source LLMs on your own infrastructure, providing low-cost AI with strong data privacy.

messages.allDisabled: All AI providers are disabled. Enable at least one provider.

settings.cacheTTLDescription: How long to cache AI-generated insights
settings.fallbackChainDescription: Order of providers to try if primary fails

title: AI Provider Configuration
